berth.name: Your Docking Berth
berth.vibe: The fold-down bunk in your docked ship. Cold plating, a recycler that hums all night, and the harbor lights strobing through the viewport. It's a bed. Barely.
berth.enter_line: You dog the hatch behind you. Home, if you can call a parked ship home.

capsule_stack.name: Capsule Stack 12-C
capsule_stack.vibe: A coffin hotel wedged under the Grid's transit deck. One molded pod, a locker, and a privacy screen that mostly works. It's yours until the rent lapses.
capsule_stack.enter_line: You slot into the pod and pull the screen. Small, dry, off the street. It'll do.

tide_houseboat.name: The Salt Wren (houseboat)
tide_houseboat.vibe: A patched-hull houseboat rocking at the end of the Tide Line's floating dock. Salvage nets, a driftwood stove, and the whole sea breathing under the floor. You sleep like the tide.
tide_houseboat.enter_line: The deck gives under your step and settles. Gulls, brine, and quiet. You're home.

bloom_conservatory.name: Conservatory Flat
bloom_conservatory.vibe: A glass-roofed flat over the Bloom bazaar, half greenhouse. Vines up the brick, a pollinator drone drowsing in the ferns, and light that makes everything look loved. You always have something to bring someone.
bloom_conservatory.enter_line: Warm, green, alive. The ferns lean toward you as the door seals.

citadel_arcology.name: Arcology Unit 4400
citadel_arcology.vibe: A serviced unit high in a Citadel arcology: climate-perfect, sound-sealed, a wall terminal wired straight to the corp datastacks. The lease has fine print you didn't read. You sleep like the dead and wake sharp.
citadel_arcology.enter_line: The door reads you in without a sound. The city is a circuit board far below.
